papers.title_zh: 从观测到洞见：机制世界模型与自主发现的探索
papers.summary_cn: 本文讨论为何高精度预测并不等同于科学发现，指出科学理解的核心在于识别能够反复复用的解释性机制，而不仅是建立输入到输出的映射。作者据此提出“机制世界模型”这一概念框架，把可复用机制放在表示、计算与学习的中心位置。论文还尝试从科学哲学与机器学习交叉视角，梳理实现自主科学发现所需的能力与设计原则。
innovations: 提出“机制世界模型”这一新的设计范式，主张以可复用解释机制而非纯预测映射作为模型核心。
将科学发现表述为知识组织问题，并据此总结出支持发现能力的计算需求与归纳压力。
形式化描述了以机制为中心的世界模型结构，为表示、计算和学习提供统一蓝图。
把机制可解释性、因果表征学习、方程发现和模块化架构等方向纳入同一统一框架中加以关联。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向 AI for Science 与自主科学发现场景，适用于需要从观测数据中提炼可解释规律、生成机制性理解，而不只是做预测的研究任务。
papers.title_en: From Observation to Insight: Mechanistic World Models and the Quest for Autonomous Discovery

papers.title: Q2NSViz: An Open-source Standalone Visualizer for Quantum Network Simulations
papers.abstract: The unique and non-classical features of quantum networks make their simulation and intuitive understanding inherently difficult. In this work, we present Q2NSViz, an open-source Python-based visualization tool for replaying and inspecting quantum-network simulation traces. Q2NSViz reconstructs the time evolution of the simulated network state, including physical topology, stored and in-flight qubits, classical bits and packets, measurements, and entanglement relationships. In this way, it exposes not only physical connectivity, but also the dynamic entanglement-induced structure produced, consumed, and transformed by protocol execution. Q2NSViz is built around a decoupled JSON/NDJSON trace contract, a Qt-free replay engine, and an interactive PyQt6 interface, making it a standalone companion to Q2NS and reusable by other simulation backends that emit the same trace format. By turning execution traces into navigable and reproducible visual artifacts, Q2NSViz provides a zero-coding tool for researchers and educators, narrowing the gap between abstract protocol logic and concrete execution.

papers.title_zh: Q2NSViz：用于量子网络仿真的开源独立可视化工具
papers.summary_cn: 本文介绍了 Q2NSViz，一个基于 Python 的量子网络仿真可视化工具，用于回放和检查量子网络的仿真轨迹。它能够重建网络状态随时间的演化过程，展示物理拓扑、量子比特、经典比特与分组、测量结果以及纠缠关系。该工具通过可交互、可复现的可视化形式，帮助研究者和教学用户更直观地理解抽象协议在执行中的动态行为。
innovations: 提出面向量子网络仿真轨迹的独立可视化工具，可系统重建并回放仿真执行过程。
不仅展示物理连接关系，还显式呈现协议执行过程中生成、消耗和转换的纠缠结构。
采用解耦的 JSON/NDJSON 轨迹契约与无 Qt 依赖的回放引擎，便于复用于其他仿真后端。
提供交互式 PyQt6 界面与零编码使用方式，降低量子网络仿真分析与教学门槛。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于量子网络协议研究、仿真结果分析与教学演示场景，帮助用户理解量子网络执行过程中状态演化与纠缠关系变化。
papers.title_en: Q2NSViz: An Open-source Standalone Visualizer for Quantum Network Simulations

papers.title: Auditable and Transparent Fully Authenticated Disk Encryption via USB Storage Interposition
papers.abstract: Full Disk Encryption (FDE) has become increasingly important in the last decades due to the evident confidentiality concerns. In most systems, encryption is provided by an operating system driver, through which the user can transparently access the encrypted disk after supplying the required keys (or the credentials from which those keys are derived). In this work, we explore an alternative approach: the use of an intermediate USB device placed between the host system and the external hard disk, where the encrypted data are stored. Although there are existing devices that follow this inline approach (such as RAID controllers and USB enclosures with built-in encryption), we explore the use of a general-purpose single-board computer running Linux with USB On-The-Go support (e.g. a Raspberry Pi), to provide FADE (Fully Authenticated Disk Encryption). Our system, named CC (Cryptographic Companion), performs the cryptographic operations (encryption/decryption and authentication), providing a standard USB mass-storage interface to the host (which is entirely unaware of the presence of encryption) while relying on the external USB hard disk to store the corresponding encrypted blocks. Our design provides several key advantages: flexibility, low cost, transparency, the use of generic hardware and free and open-source software, adaptability to emerging cryptographic schemes, and mitigations against malicious disk firmware. This paper presents the design and implementation of the CC and an experimental evaluation of our current research prototype, which indicates that it is sufficiently efficient for most common use cases.

papers.title_zh: 通过 USB 存储中介实现可审计且透明的全认证磁盘加密
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出一种不同于传统操作系统驱动式全盘加密的方案：在主机与外部硬盘之间加入一个通用 USB 中介设备来完成加解密与认证。作者实现了名为 CC（Cryptographic Companion）的系统，它对主机暴露标准 USB 大容量存储接口，而将加密块存储在外部硬盘上。该方案强调透明性、可审计性、低成本和对恶意磁盘固件的缓解能力。
innovations: 提出基于 USB 中介设备而非主机操作系统驱动的全认证磁盘加密架构。
使用通用单板计算机与自由开源软件实现透明的块级加密、解密与认证。
设计出主机无感知的标准 USB 存储接口，同时在中介侧完成密码学处理。
从体系结构上提供对恶意磁盘固件的缓解，并增强方案的可审计性与可适配性。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于外接硬盘、便携式存储和需要主机无感接入加密存储的场景。它要解决的是传统全盘加密依赖主机驱动、审计透明性有限以及外部存储固件潜在不可信的问题。
papers.title_en: Auditable and Transparent Fully Authenticated Disk Encryption via USB Storage Interposition

papers.title: ExtraGS: Enhancing Endoscopic View Extrapolation via Diffusion-Guided 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Robot-assisted minimally invasive surgery (MIS) critically depends on reliable endoscopic perception for navigation and safety. However, conventional endoscopes provide only a limited field of view, leaving large portions of surrounding anatomy unobserved. Recent neural rendering approaches, such as Neural Radiance Fields and 3D Gaussian Splatting, enable novel view synthesis from endoscopic videos, but their reliance on sparse observations often leads to severe artifacts when extrapolating beyond the training this http URL this work, we propose ExtraGS, a framework for enhancing endoscopic view extrapolation via diffusion-guided 3D Gaussian Splatting. Starting from an initial reconstruction, we introduce an uncertainty-guided virtual camera sampling strategy to actively explore blind spots and maximize information gain. The rendered views from these sampled locations are refined using a diffusion model to recover plausible anatomical structures, producing pseudo observations that guide further optimization. To prevent the generated content from degrading reliable regions, we adopt a confidence-weighted fine-tuning strategy when incorporating these pseudo this http URL experiments on multiple public endoscopic datasets demonstrate that ExtraGS significantly reduces extrapolation artifacts and achieves state-of-the-art performance in endoscopic novel view synthesis.

papers.title_zh: ExtraGS：通过扩散引导的三维高斯泼溅增强内窥镜视角外推
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文面向机器人辅助手术中的内窥镜感知，解决内窥镜视野有限导致未观测解剖区域难以重建的问题。作者提出 ExtraGS，在初始三维高斯泼溅重建基础上，主动采样高不确定性区域的虚拟相机视角，并用扩散模型细化渲染结果，生成伪观测来继续优化重建。该方法旨在减少超出训练视角范围时的新视图合成伪影。
innovations: 将扩散模型与 3D Gaussian Splatting 结合，用于增强内窥镜场景中的视角外推能力。
提出不确定性引导的虚拟相机采样策略，主动探索盲区并提升信息增益。
利用扩散模型修复采样视角下的渲染结果，生成可用于后续优化的伪观测。
采用置信度加权微调机制，在引入伪观测时尽量避免破坏原本可靠的重建区域。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于机器人辅助手术、微创手术导航和内窥镜视频驱动的新视图合成。它主要解决稀疏观测下内窥镜场景外推伪影严重、难以可靠补全未观测解剖区域的问题。
papers.title_en: ExtraGS: Enhancing Endoscopic View Extrapolation via Diffusion-Guided 3D Gaussian Splatting

papers.title: GRAFT: Graph-Matched Retrieval and Fusion of Tables in Data Lakes
papers.abstract: Autonomous data agents resolve analytical queries by retrieving and reasoning over evidence in tabular data lakes. Existing methods score tables independently against the query and ignore the joinability and unionability that link them, returning fragmented evidence that downstream agents cannot integrate. We propose GRAFT (Graph-matched Retrieval and Fusion of Tables), structured around two principal contributions. First, we cast table retrieval as a graph matching problem between a query-derived intent graph and a heterogeneous data lake graph, and introduce IGMS, a log-determinant reward that couples semantic relevance, structural compatibility, and evidence diversity in a single objective. Second, we recast subgraph generation as a Markov decision process and learn a value function via implicit Q-learning on self-generated trajectories produced by a canonical compression operator that inverts the homomorphism. We further design a three-stage online pipeline that exploits anchor reachability, predicate admissibility, and reward monotonicity to greatly prune the candidate space before exact IGMS evaluation. On Spider and BIRD adapted to the tabular data lake setting, GRAFT achieves the best Recall, Precision, F1, and Sufficiency among point-wise, greedy-expansion, and structure-aware baselines, with relative gains of 7.8% in F1 and 10.6% in Sufficiency over the strongest baseline, while maintaining high search efficiency.

papers.title_zh: GRAFT：数据湖中表格的图匹配检索与融合
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文关注自主数据代理在表格型数据湖中回答分析查询时，如何检索并整合多张相关表格作为证据。作者指出，现有方法通常独立地为每张表打分，忽略表与表之间可连接、可并合的结构关系，导致返回的证据碎片化。为此，论文提出 GRAFT，将检索问题建模为查询意图图与数据湖异构图之间的图匹配，并结合在线剪枝与学习式子图生成来提升检索质量和效率。
innovations: 将表格检索从独立表打分改写为查询意图图与数据湖图之间的图匹配问题，显式建模表之间的连接性与可合并性。
提出 IGMS 奖励目标，将语义相关性、结构兼容性和证据多样性统一到单一目标中进行评估。
把候选子图生成重述为马尔可夫决策过程，并通过基于自生成轨迹的隐式 Q-learning 学习价值函数。
设计三阶段在线检索流程，利用锚点可达性、谓词可接受性与奖励单调性对候选空间进行剪枝。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于企业数据湖、湖仓或多表分析系统中，智能代理需要从多张相关表中检索并拼接证据来回答复杂分析问题的场景，尤其适合需要跨表推理、联结和整合证据的任务。
papers.title_en: GRAFT: Graph-Matched Retrieval and Fusion of Tables in Data Lakes
